title: Troubleshoot and Fix KB Ingest Scheduled Job
summary: Root cause: OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD env var causes opencode run to fail with 'Session not found' (GitHub issue #24204). Fixed by creating opencode-run-safe.ps1 wrapper that unsets the env var before invoking opencode run. Updated all 3 affected scheduled tasks.
keyOutcomes: Updated 3 scheduled tasks: KB Ingest, Conductor Weekly Report, Marketing Skill Sync
Removed --agent general flag from KB Ingest task (no 'general' primary agent exists)
Confirmed fix: scheduled task now runs successfully instead of failing instantly
validationCriteria: `opencode run` succeeds with a test message
ms365 MCP removed from global config
